description: This is a Java JUnit test class for a Spring Boot web MVC controller, specifically testing the SupportingDocumentController. It contains test cases to verify authentication, input validation, and interaction with the SupportingDocumentService for uploading supporting documents related to business loans.

classes.name: test_supporting_document_controller_webmvc_test
classes.description: Test class for SupportingDocumentController, verifying security, validation, and service interaction during document uploads.

methods.name: stubJwt
methods.description: Helper method to mock JWT claims based on provided token, subject, and roles.

methods.name: upload_withoutJwt_is401
methods.description: Test case verifying that uploading a document without a JWT returns a 401 Unauthorized response.

methods.name: upload_withNonUuidSubject_is400
methods.description: Test case verifying that a JWT with a non-UUID subject results in a 400 Bad Request error.

methods.name: upload_withValidJwt_callsService
methods.description: Test case verifying successful upload when a valid JWT with a UUID subject is provided; checks interaction with service and response correctness.
